requirements.title: User Authentication
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to authenticate via a secure login form.

requirements.title: File Upload
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to upload files from their local system to the server.

requirements.title: Home Page Examples Listing
requirements.description: The system shall display a list of links to all available example pages on the root URL.

requirements.title: Footer Attribution
requirements.description: The system shall display a consistent footer attributing the site to Elemental Selenium on example pages.

requirements.title: Checkbox State Toggle
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to toggle the checked or unchecked state of checkboxes.

requirements.title: Dropdown Selection Management
requirements.description: The system shall provide a selectable list of options and allow the user to change the current selection.

requirements.title: File Upload Capability
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to select a file from their system and initiate an upload process.

requirements.title: Basic Alert Trigger
requirements.description: The system shall trigger a JavaScript alert dialog upon user interaction.

requirements.title: Confirm and Prompt Triggers
requirements.description: The system shall trigger JavaScript confirm and prompt dialogs upon user interaction.

requirements.title: Drag and Drop Rendering
requirements.description: The system shall display a region that supports drag-and-drop functionality.

requirements.title: Data Tables Rendering
requirements.description: The system shall display data tables containing specific user information columns.

requirements.title: Row Actions Representation
requirements.description: The system shall provide edit and delete action controls within each table row.

requirements.title: Notification Message Rendering
requirements.description: The system shall display a notification message above the page heading.

requirements.title: Load New Notification Message
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to refresh and load a new notification message.

requirements.title: Entry Ad Display
requirements.description: The system shall automatically display an advertisement modal upon page load.

requirements.title: Ad Suppression
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to close the advertisement and suppress its appearance on subsequent loads.

requirements.title: Ad Re-enablement
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to re-enable a previously closed ad so that it displays on subsequent page loads.

requirements.title: Dynamic Typo Generation
requirements.description: The system shall randomly include or exclude typos in the displayed text upon page load.

requirements.title: Dynamic Element Addition
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to dynamically add new elements to the page via an interaction.

requirements.title: Dynamic Element Removal
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to remove dynamically added elements from the page.

requirements.title: Hover-to-Reveal Information
requirements.description: The system shall reveal hidden user details when the user hovers over specific image elements.

requirements.title: Custom Context Menu Triggering
requirements.description: The system shall provide a custom context menu that triggers a JavaScript alert upon selection.

requirements.title: File Download Initiation
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to initiate file downloads by selecting links from a provided list.

requirements.title: Password Retrieval
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to submit an email address to request a password retrieval.

requirements.title: Geolocation Access
requirements.description: The system shall access and display the user's current latitude and longitude upon request.

requirements.title: JavaScript Dialog Handling
requirements.description: The system shall process user interactions with browser-native alert, confirm, and prompt dialogs.

requirements.title: Horizontal Slider Interaction
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to adjust a horizontal slider value using keyboard and mouse inputs.

requirements.title: Infinite Scroll Content Loading
requirements.description: The system shall dynamically load additional content as the user scrolls to the bottom of the page.

acceptance_criteria.description: User shall be granted access upon providing valid credentials.
User shall be denied access and notified upon providing invalid credentials.
User shall be able to select and upload a valid file.
System shall confirm successful file upload to the user.
The page shall display a heading 'Welcome to the-internet' and 'Available Examples'.
The page shall present a vertical list of example names as hyperlinks.
The page shall display a footer containing the text 'Powered by Elemental Selenium'.
The footer shall be present on example pages including /checkboxes and /login.
Clicking a checkbox shall toggle its state between checked and unchecked.
The system shall maintain the checkbox state according to browser default behavior.
User shall be granted access to the secure area upon entering valid username and password.
User shall receive an error message when providing incorrect login information.
System shall navigate to the secure area upon successful authentication.
System shall display an error message when invalid credentials are provided.
System shall display a dropdown with at least two selectable options.
System shall update the visible selection when a user selects an option.
System shall provide a file input control for user file selection.
System shall process the file upload upon clicking the upload button.
Browser shall display an alert dialog when the alert button is clicked.
Result area shall reflect the outcome after the alert is dismissed.
Browser shall display a confirm dialog when the confirm button is clicked.
Browser shall display a prompt dialog when the prompt button is clicked.
The page shall render a region visually suggesting drag-and-drop capability.
The drag-and-drop area shall be accessible upon loading the page.
The table shall contain columns for Last Name, First Name, Due, Web Site, and Action.
The table shall display the predefined rows of user data.
Each row shall contain an edit control.
Each row shall contain a delete control.
A notification message shall be visible above the page heading.
The notification message shall describe an action outcome.
Clicking the load link shall update the notification message.
The system shall not produce runtime errors when loading a new message.
An advertisement modal shall appear automatically on page load.
The advertisement shall be visually distinguishable from the background.
The advertisement shall be dismissed upon clicking the close control.
The advertisement shall not reappear on subsequent page reloads.
User shall be able to trigger ad re-enablement via the provided control.
The ad shall reappear on the /entry_ad page after the re-enablement action is performed.
The system shall display text that varies in typo presence across multiple page refreshes.
The system shall provide descriptive text explaining the random typo behavior.
The system shall render a new element on the page upon each click of the add button.
The system shall support multiple consecutive additions of elements.
The system shall remove the specific element associated with the removal control.
The removed element shall no longer be visible in the DOM.
User details shall be hidden by default on page load.
User details shall become visible when the mouse pointer is positioned over the image.
Right-clicking in the designated area shall display the custom context menu.
Selecting the menu item shall trigger a browser-based JavaScript alert.
Clicking a file link shall initiate the browser's download process.
The system shall display a list of available files for download.
The system shall accept a valid email format for password retrieval.
The system shall process the submission when the retrieve button is clicked.
The system shall display latitude and longitude coordinates upon successful access.
The system shall request user permission before accessing location data.
System shall grant access to secure area upon entry of valid credentials.
System shall display an error message and refuse access for invalid credentials.
System shall process file upload requests.
System shall remain stable when handling unsupported file formats or large files.
System shall render result output after user interaction with dialogs.
System shall maintain page functionality after dialog dismissal or cancellation.
Slider shall respond to both mouse drag and keyboard arrow key inputs.
Slider value shall be clamped at the defined minimum and maximum limits.
System shall append new content sections upon reaching the scroll threshold.
System shall stop loading content gracefully when no further data is available.
System shall display coordinates when user grants location permission.
System shall handle location denial or unavailability without crashing.

positive_scenarios.title: Login With Valid Credentials
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is authenticated and redirected to the secure area.

positive_scenarios.title: User Logout
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session is terminated and redirected to login page.

positive_scenarios.title: Upload Valid File
steps: Select a valid file from local system
positive_scenarios.expected_result: File is successfully uploaded and confirmation is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Uploaded File Name
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The system displays the name of the uploaded file.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Home Page Content
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Page displays correct headings and list of links.

positive_scenarios.title: Navigate to Example Page
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is redirected to the selected example page.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Footer Presence
steps: Scroll to the bottom of the page
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Footer text 'Powered by Elemental Selenium' is visible.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Footer on Multiple Pages
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Footer is present on both pages.

positive_scenarios.title: Check Unchecked Box
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Checkbox becomes checked.

positive_scenarios.title: Uncheck Checked Box
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Checkbox becomes unchecked.

positive_scenarios.title: Login With Valid Credentials 2
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is granted access to the secure area.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Login Page Elements
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Username field, Password field, and Login button are displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Successful Login
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is redirected to the secure area.

positive_scenarios.title: Select Dropdown Option
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The dropdown displays Option 1 as the selected value.

positive_scenarios.title: Upload File Successfully
steps: Select a file from the local system
positive_scenarios.expected_result: System accepts the file and confirms upload.

positive_scenarios.title: Change Dropdown Selection
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The dropdown displays Option 2 as the selected value.

positive_scenarios.title: Use Drag and Drop for Upload
steps: Drag a file into the designated area
positive_scenarios.expected_result: System accepts the file and confirms upload.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Secure Area Access
positive_scenarios.expected_result: URL changes to /secure or equivalent.

positive_scenarios.title: Trigger Alert Dialog
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Browser displays alert dialog.

positive_scenarios.title: Dismiss Alert Dialog
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Alert closes and result area updates.

positive_scenarios.title: Trigger Confirm Dialog
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Browser displays confirm dialog.

positive_scenarios.title: Trigger Prompt Dialog
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Browser displays prompt dialog.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Drag and Drop Area
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Drag and drop region is rendered.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Drag and Drop Content
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Page displays drag-and-drop targets.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Table Headers
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Tables display correct column headers.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Table Data
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Tables display expected user rows.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Edit Action
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Edit link is present in every row.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Delete Action
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Delete link is present in every row.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Notification Display
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Notification message is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Notification Content
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Notification text is visible.

positive_scenarios.title: Load New Notification
steps: Click 'Click here to load a new message'
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Notification message updates.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Multiple Notification Loads
positive_scenarios.expected_result: System continues to display new messages.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Ad Display
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Ad modal appears.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Ad Visibility
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Ad is distinguishable from background.

positive_scenarios.title: Close Ad
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Ad is dismissed.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Ad Suppression
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Ad does not reappear.

positive_scenarios.title: Re-enable Ad Successfully
steps: Navigate to the ad re-enablement control
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The ad is displayed on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Ad Persistence After Re-enable
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The ad remains visible on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Observe Typo Presence
steps: Refresh page until a typo is visible
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Text containing a typo is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Observe Correct Text
steps: Refresh page until no typo is visible
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Text is displayed without typos.

positive_scenarios.title: Add Single Element
positive_scenarios.expected_result: A new element appears on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Add Multiple Elements
steps: Click Add Element button three times
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Three new elements appear on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Remove Added Element
steps: Click the remove control for that element
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The element is removed from the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Remove Multiple Elements
steps: Click remove for the first element
Click remove for the second element
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Both elements are removed from the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Reveal Details on Hover
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User name and profile link are displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Hide Details on Mouse Out
steps: Move mouse away from the image
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User details are hidden.

positive_scenarios.title: Trigger Custom Context Menu
positive_scenarios.expected_result: JavaScript alert is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Display Context Menu
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Custom context menu appears.

positive_scenarios.title: Download File
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Browser initiates file download.

positive_scenarios.title: View File List
positive_scenarios.expected_result: List of files is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Submit Password Retrieval
positive_scenarios.expected_result: System processes the request.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Form Presence
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Email field and button are visible.

positive_scenarios.title: Get Geolocation
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Latitude and longitude are displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Geolocation UI
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Heading and button are visible.

positive_scenarios.title: Successful File Upload
positive_scenarios.expected_result: File is processed by the system.

positive_scenarios.title: Handle JavaScript Alert
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Result output is rendered on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Handle JavaScript Confirm
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Result output reflects confirmation.

positive_scenarios.title: Adjust Slider Using Mouse
steps: Click and drag the slider handle to a new position
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Slider value updates to reflect the new position.

positive_scenarios.title: Adjust Slider Using Keyboard
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Slider value increases incrementally.

positive_scenarios.title: Load Content via Scroll
steps: Scroll to the bottom of the page
positive_scenarios.expected_result: New content sections are appended to the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Continuous Loading
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Content continues to load dynamically.

positive_scenarios.title: Grant Geolocation Permission
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Latitude and Longitude coordinates are displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Geolocation UI 2
positive_scenarios.expected_result: System attempts to retrieve location data.

negative_scenarios.title: Login With Invalid Credentials
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System displays an error message and denies access.

negative_scenarios.title: Upload Without Selecting File
steps: Click upload button without selecting a file
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System does not process upload and provides feedback.

negative_scenarios.title: Access Non-Existent Path
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System handles the request gracefully (e.g., 404 error).

negative_scenarios.title: Verify Footer Absence on Invalid Page
steps: Navigate to a page without footer

negative_scenarios.title: Interact with Disabled Checkbox
steps: Attempt to click a disabled checkbox

negative_scenarios.title: Upload Without File Selection
steps: Click Upload without selecting a file
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Browser default behavior for empty file input is triggered.

negative_scenarios.title: Trigger Alert Without Interaction
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No alert is displayed until button is clicked.

negative_scenarios.title: Trigger Dialogs Without Interaction
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No dialogs are displayed until buttons are clicked.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify Non-existent Drag Area
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Drag and drop area is not rendered.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify Missing Table Data
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Table does not render if data source is empty.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify Ad Absence on Second Load
Verify No System Error on Refresh
Add Element Without Interaction
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No new elements are added to the page.

negative_scenarios.title: Remove Non-Existent Element
steps: Attempt to trigger remove action without adding elements

negative_scenarios.title: Left Click in Box Area
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Custom context menu does not appear.

negative_scenarios.title: Submit Upload Without File
steps: Click submit without selecting a file

negative_scenarios.title: Cancel JavaScript Confirm
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Result output reflects cancellation without script errors.

negative_scenarios.title: Scroll Beyond Available Content
steps: Scroll to the end of all available content

negative_scenarios.title: Deny Geolocation Permission 2
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System handles denial gracefully without crashing.

boundary_scenarios.title: Login With Empty Credentials
steps: Leave username and password fields blank

boundary_scenarios.title: Upload Empty File
steps: Select a file with 0 bytes size
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: System handles the empty file upload appropriately.

boundary_scenarios.title: Add Large Number of Elements
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: 100 elements are successfully added to the page.

boundary_scenarios.title: Remove All Added Elements
steps: Remove all 50 elements one by one
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: All elements are removed and page is empty.

boundary_scenarios.title: Login With Empty Fields
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: System treats input as incorrect and displays error.

boundary_scenarios.title: Rapid Dialog Triggering
steps: Click alert button multiple times rapidly

boundary_scenarios.title: Slider Maximum Limit
steps: Attempt to move slider beyond maximum value
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: Slider value clamps at the maximum limit.

boundary_scenarios.title: Slider Minimum Limit
steps: Attempt to move slider below minimum value
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: Slider value clamps at the minimum limit.

boundary_scenarios.title: Location Service Unavailable
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: System displays empty coordinates or message without error.
